body: Hi Mr. Sharma — Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy Malviya Nagar. Your metformin, atorvastatin, and telmisartan refill is due around 28 Apr 2026. body: Hi Rashmi, PowerHouse Fitness HSR Layout here. It's been a couple of months since we last saw you—we remember you loved those weekday evening sessions.
